text.message: Red, you racing me to the wood port or you good with the brick port?

he has it if he wants to

rly gotta stop trading red 1 for 1
ok then i have to do with red

I dont think im the only threat
Once red settles on wood port it’s now over
What is so different about my port and black and ojs lol
that you have two of them
Once you city, we can’t catch up

it should still be blue here
Soft just hope he doesnt steal road

Bro we see u on 8 and open settle lol

need to dev or oj gets army
